falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: on Mac (uname=Darwin) without HIVE_KICK_ALLOW_MAC_LOCAL=1, hexa run hive/tool/subagent_dispatch.hexa <sid> <task> exits with raw 66 ai-native error reason=mac-local-kick-refused

honesty_triad.honest_c3_disclosure: patches LANDED (code committed to fix/mac-kick-path-deprecation branch), but real-world VALIDATION (running nexus kick run <topic> on Mac to observe refused message) is DEFERRED to follow-up cycle. F1-F5 are deterministic falsifiers — verdict_check predicates are static (grep / exit code / awk var) and SHOULD pass on any subsequent execution; falsifier_pass_count=0 in this witness reflects that this witness JSON itself does NOT execute them (raw 91 honest C3 — emitting witness ≠ running falsifier).
